description_long: This is a single, elegant white rose with a long, slender stem and three visible leaves. The petals are arranged in a layered, spiral fashion, with each petal slightly overlapping the next, creating a full and natural bloom. The edges of the petals are tinged with a subtle yellow hue, adding a delicate contrast to the predominantly white flower. The stem is thin and straight, colored in a gradient from green to yellow, and supports the bloom at its apex. The leaves are ovate, with smooth edges and a slight curve, attached at intervals along the stem. The overall appearance is realistic and refined, suitable for decorative or naturalistic urban settings such as parks or gardens.
description: A realistic white rose with yellow-tipped petals, a slender green-yellow stem, and three ovate leaves. The petals are layered in a spiral, creating a full, natural bloom.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rose's layered petals and two leaves on the left side of the stem.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the vertical alignment of the leaves and the spiral arrangement of the petals.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bloom and the largest leaf extending to the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the smallest leaf visible and the petal layering clearly seen.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a spiral, whorled configuration, with each petal overlapping the next in concentric layers, creating a symmetrical and full bloom typical of a rose.
